title: IST02-IST03 JSE-Eskom Infrastructure-Coupled Financial Network Dataset
description: Hypergraph edge-weight time series linking 87 JSE-listed securities to 34 Eskom transmission grid nodes (January 2015 to December 2025, T=2870 trading days, 340 hyperedges). Supports IST-02 CASCADEnt/VORTEX and IST-03 PHYSAN research series by Prof. N.D. Moroke, North-West University, South Africa.
